title: Formula Editor Popup
description: Administrator can create and edit formulas via a popup editor. Formulas use JSON AST but are rendered in human-readable syntax. Variables from the current collection (question values, formula results) can be inserted and connected with operators (+, -, *, /, &&, ||). If-else uses ternary syntax: condition ? when-true : otherwise. Output type is number or boolean. Malformed formulas or conflicting output types produce validation errors.
